name: Chocolate Almond Coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Process the nutmeg and coffee in a blender.
2. Add the chocolate extract and almond extract.
3. Blend for an additional 10 seconds.
4. Transfer to a bowl and stir in the chopped toasted almonds.
5. Store in the refrigerator.
6. To brew, place the mixture into the filter of an automatic drip coffee maker.
7. Add 6 cups of water and brew (using a percolator).
